hooks.command: /usr/bin/env sh -lc 'script=$(ls -dt "${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}"/plugins/cache/*/usage-guard/*/scripts/usage_guard_once.py 2>/dev/null | head -n 1); [ -n "$script" ] || exit 0; exec /usr/bin/env python3 "$script" --source PreToolUse --settle-timeout-ms 400 --settle-interval-ms 100'

/usr/bin/env sh -lc 'script=$(ls -dt "${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}"/plugins/cache/*/usage-guard/*/scripts/usage_guard_once.py 2>/dev/null | head -n 1); [ -n "$script" ] || exit 0; exec /usr/bin/env python3 "$script" --source PostToolUse --settle-timeout-ms 400 --settle-interval-ms 100'

/usr/bin/env sh -lc 'script=$(ls -dt "${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}"/plugins/cache/*/usage-guard/*/scripts/usage_guard_once.py 2>/dev/null | head -n 1); [ -n "$script" ] || exit 0; exec /usr/bin/env python3 "$script" --source Stop'
